obj.content:
First day at work

●   Name of supervisor:

[blank]1[/blank]

●   Where to leave coat and bag:

use [blank]2[/blank] in staffroom

●   See Tiffany in HR:

to give [blank]3[/blank] number

to collect [blank]4[/blank]

●   Location of HR office:

on [blank]5[/blank] floor

●   Supervisor's mobile number:

[blank]6[/blank]
obj.html_content:
First day at work

●   Name of supervisor:

●   Where to leave coat and bag:

use  in staffroom

●   See Tiffany in HR:

to give  number

to collect 

●   Location of HR office:

on  floor

●   Supervisor's mobile number:

added_content.ex_information:
Complete the notes below.
Write
ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER
for each answer.

sentence.content: Kaeden: Hello Charlotte. I’m Kaeden, one of the supervisors. Welcome to the team.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：你好，夏洛特。我是凯登，我是主管之一。欢迎加入我们的团队。

sentence.content: Charlotte: Hi Aiden.
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：你好，艾登。

sentence.content: Kaeden: It’s Kaeden.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：是凯登。

sentence.content: Charlotte: I’m so sorry.
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：对不起。

sentence.content: Kaeden: Don’t worry. People often get my name wrong; they never know how to spell it. It’s K-A-E-D-E-N, in case you ever need to write it.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：别担心。人们经常弄错我的名字，他们从来不知道如何拼写。我的名字是 K-A-E-D-E-N，或许你有时候要写到。

sentence.content: Charlotte: I’ll try and remember.
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：我会尽量记住的。

sentence.content: Kaeden: So, there are a few practical things you need to sort out this morning. Then I’ll show you what you’re going to do today.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：那么，今天上午你需要解决一些实际问题。然后我会告诉你今天要做什么。

sentence.content: Charlotte: The email I received said to go to the front desk, to show my letter of appointment and pick up my badge.
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：我收到的电子邮件上说，去前台出示我的任命书并领取胸卡。

sentence.content: Kaeden: You’ll need that for the staffroom and other areas of the supermarket where shoppers aren’t allowed.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：你需要这个才能进入员工休息室和超市其他不允许顾客进入的区域。

sentence.content: Kaeden: So, after you’ve finished at the front desk, I’ll take you to the staffroom. Put your coat and rucksack in one of the lockers there. Take whichever one is free.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：你在前台办完手续后，我带你去员工休息室。把你的大衣和背包放在储物柜里，看哪个还空着就放进去。

sentence.content: Charlotte: Will I have a key?
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：我会有钥匙吗？

sentence.content: Kaeden: Yes. Try not to lose it. At the end of the day, leave it in the door for the next person to use.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：有。尽量不要弄丢。一天结束时，把钥匙留在柜门上，供下一个人使用。

sentence.content: Charlotte: Will do.
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：好的。

sentence.content: Kaeden: You also need to go to the HR department to see Tiffany. She’s really helpful.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：你还需要去人力资源部找蒂芙尼。她会帮到你很多。

sentence.content: Charlotte: I was told to bring my passport with me. HR need to take a note of the number in it.
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：我被告知要带上我的护照。人力资源部门需要记下护照上的号码。

sentence.content: Kaeden: That’s right. Or you can show your ID card.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：没错。你也可以出示身份证。

sentence.content: Charlotte: I don’t have one of those.
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：我没有身份证。

sentence.content: Kaeden: OK. Tiffany will give you a uniform. They have lots in different sizes, so you just tell her what you need.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：好的。蒂芙尼会给你一套制服。他们有很多不同尺寸的制服，你只需告诉她你需要的尺寸。

sentence.content: Kaeden: I won’t come with you to HR – I’ve got to go and sort something else out. Problem with a bread slicer.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：我不跟你去人力资源部了，我得去处理别的事情。面包切片机的问题。

sentence.content: Charlotte: Is the HR office near the staffroom?
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：人力资源办公室在员工休息室附近吗？

sentence.content: Kaeden: The staffroom’s on the first floor, and HR are a couple of floors above that, on the third floor. There’s a staircase outside the staffroom.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：员工休息室在一楼，人力资源部在三楼。员工休息室外面有一个楼梯。

sentence.content: Charlotte: OK.
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：好的。

sentence.content: Kaeden: When you’ve finished with HR, come and find me in the bakery section of the shop.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：等你处理完人事部的事，就来店里的面包房找我。

sentence.content: Charlotte: I’m looking forward to getting started.
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：我很期待开始工作。

sentence.content: Kaeden: I’ll just give you my phone number, in case you can’t find me. Have you got your phone there?
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：我给你我的电话号码，以防你找不到我。你带电话了吗？

sentence.content: Charlotte: Yes . . . OK, ready.
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：有……好的，准备好了。

sentence.content: Kaeden: It’s oh-four-one-two double-six-five nine-oh-three.
Charlotte: OK, done.
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：好的，记下来了。

sentence.content: Kaeden: So, Charlotte, your tasks today are in the bakery section, on the sushi counter, and on the meat and fish counters.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：夏洛特，你今天的任务是在面包房、寿司柜台、肉类和鱼类柜台工作。

sentence.content: Kaeden: The first job is to check sell-by dates on the bread and cakes. If any of the dates are today’s, put a new price label on the packaging.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：第一项工作是检查面包和蛋糕的销售日期。如果有任何日期是今天的，就在包装上贴上新的价格标签。

sentence.content: Charlotte: What if any of the labels are yesterday’s dates, or older? Do I throw those items away?
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：如果标签上的日期是昨天或更早怎么办？我要扔掉它们吗？

sentence.content: Kaeden: Yes, but that shouldn’t happen – we check the stock every day. When something needs a new price label, put a yellow one on the package, next to the original price.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：是的，但这不应该发生-我们每天都会检查库存。当需要新的价格标签时，就在原来的价格标签旁边贴上黄色标签。

sentence.content: Charlotte: OK.
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：好的。

sentence.content: Kaeden: After that, you’ll go to the sushi takeaway counter.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：然后，你就可以去寿司外卖柜台了。

sentence.content: Charlotte: Will I be preparing boxes of food?
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：我要准备食物吗？

sentence.content: Kaeden: For today, you’ll just be helping the staff.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：今天，你只需要帮助工作人员。

sentence.content: Charlotte: Yes, of course.
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：是的，当然。

sentence.content: Kaeden: You’ll see lots of flat cardboard boxes at one end of the counter.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：你会在柜台的一端看到很多扁平的纸箱。

sentence.content: Kaeden: Beneath those is where we keep the plastic boxes – we run out of those really quickly, so you should bring more from the storeroom.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：在这些箱子下面是我们放塑料盒的地方，但总是很快就用完了，所以你要从储藏室多拿些来。

sentence.content: Charlotte: Is that my only task on the sushi counter?
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：这是我在寿司柜台的唯一任务吗？

sentence.content: Kaeden: No. You also need to clean the area where they prepare the dishes. There are cloths and bottles of spray by the sink. Oh, and please make sure you clean that too.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：不。你还需要清洁准备餐具的区域。水槽旁有抹布和喷射清洁剂。对了，请务必把水槽那里也打扫干净。

sentence.content: Charlotte: Sure. That’s important, isn’t it?
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：当然，这很重要，不是吗？

sentence.content: Kaeden: Absolutely. But you mustn’t wash up knives. You have to do some training before you’re allowed to touch sharp objects.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：当然。但你不能洗刀子。你必须先接受一些培训，然后才能接触锋利的物品。

sentence.content: Charlotte: What should I do if there are any?
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：如果有尖锐物品，我该怎么办？

sentence.content: Kaeden: Ask someone to put them in the dishwasher.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：找人把它们放进洗碗机。

sentence.content: Charlotte: OK, thanks. I don’t want to get anything wrong.
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：好的，谢谢。我不想弄错任何东西。

sentence.content: Kaeden: Don’t worry. You’ll be fine. And I’ll be around to help.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：别担心。你会没事的。我会在你身边帮助你的。

sentence.content: Charlotte: Right.
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：好的。

sentence.content: Kaeden: Finally, the meat and fish counters. You need to clean the area where staff serve customers, including wiping the weighing scales.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：最后是肉类和鱼类柜台。你需要打扫员工为顾客服务的区域，包括擦拭磅秤。

sentence.content: Charlotte: OK. Anything else?
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：好的。还有什么吗？

sentence.content: Kaeden: The fish is laid on ice, but when that starts to melt, you’ll need to get more from the cold-room.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：鱼放在冰上，但当冰块开始融化时，你需要从冷藏室拿更多的冰。

sentence.content: Charlotte: I know the staff on the food counters wear a hat. Will that be the same for me?
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：我知道食品柜台的工作人员都戴帽子。我也要戴吗？

sentence.content: Kaeden: You won’t be serving customers directly, so no.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：你们不会直接为顾客服务，所以不需要。

sentence.content: Kaeden: But make sure you put on thermal gloves when you take anything out of the cold-room. The temperature’s low enough in there to get frostbite from touching things.
sentence.content_zh: 凯登：从冷藏室拿东西时一定要戴上保暖手套。那里的温度很低，碰到东西会冻伤。

sentence.content: Charlotte: Understoood.
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：明白。

obj.content:
Responsibilities

Task 1

Task 2

Notes

Bakery section

Check sell-by dates

Change price labels

Use [blank]1[/blank] labels

Sushi takeaway counter

Re-stock with [blank]2[/blank] boxes if needed

Wipe preparation area and clean the sink

Do not clean any knives

Meat and fish counters

Clean the serving area, including the weighing scales

Collect [blank]3[/blank] for the fish from the cold-room

Must wear special [blank]4[/blank]
obj.html_content:
Responsibilities

Task 1

Task 2

Notes

Bakery section

Check sell-by dates

Change price labels

Use  labels

Sushi takeaway counter

Re-stock with  boxes if needed

Wipe preparation area and clean the sink

Do not clean any knives

Meat and fish counters

Clean the serving area, including the weighing scales

Collect  for the fish from the cold-room

Must wear special

sentence.content: Charlotte: Understoood.
sentence.content_zh: 夏洛特：明白。

officialExplain.explain: 本题考查人名拼写。原文中首先出现Charlotte，并介绍自己的名字是Kaeden，之后提及自己是supervisors之一，这里对应题目中空前关键词supervisor。之后原文中给出了具体拼写K-A-E-D-E-N。Kaeden即本题答案。
结合空前后内容以及答案的词数要求，预测答案为名词。空后的staffroom在原文中提前出现，题干中的leave对应原文中的put，coat原词重现，bag被替换为rucksack，放置地点为one of the lockers。lockers即本题答案，意为“寄物柜”。

结合空前后内容，从语法角度预测答案可能为名词或形容词。题干中的HR和Tiffany在原文中原词重现，接下来原文提及要带passport，意为“护照”。HR需要记下the number in it，it指代前面提到的passport，可以得出题目中所说的号码即护照号码。之后原文中虽然还提及了ID card，意为“身份证，身份卡”，但是结合之后的回应“I don’t have one of those.”可排除这一信息。因此本题答案为passport。
结合空前内容以及答案的词数要求，预测本题答案为名词，collect在这个上下文中表示“领取，收到”。在第3题提到的否定信息之后，Kaeden继续说“Tiffany will give you a uniform.”，这里的give间接对应空前的collect，因此本题答案为uniform，意为“制服”。
本题首先需要注意题目问的是HR office的位置。原文先提及staffroom所处的位置是first floor，不符合题目，排除first这一信息。HR的位置是third floor，因此本题答案为third。
本题考查英文数字。结合空前的Supervisor’s mobile number，预测本题答案为一串数字组成的手机号码。通过原文的phone number定位，之后提及的电话号码为0412665903，即本题答案，这里需要注意数字0，在音频中发音同“oh”。
结合空前后内容，预测答案可能为名词或形容词。和本题同一行的内容中，左栏的Bakery section和Check sell-by dates在原文中原词重现。Change price labels被替换为new price label，相关信息为put a yellow one，one指代前文提及的label，yellow即本题答案。

结合空前后内容，预测答案可能为名词或形容词，空前的Re-stock表示“补充（货源），再补给”。Sushi takeaway counter和空后的boxes在原文中原词重现，帮助大致定位。boxes在原文中多次出现：第一次出现的boxes相关信息，是问是否需要准备boxes of food，但回复说you’ll just be helping the staff，因此排除food这一信息；第二次是flat cardboard boxes，但相关内容为“You’ll see lots of …”，说明较为充足，不符合题干中空前的动词Re-stock，排除这一信息；第三次是plastic boxes，后面紧跟we run out of those，those指代前面的plastic boxes。原文中run out of sth.表示“用完，耗尽（供应品）”，而且bring more from the storeroom对应空前的Re-stock。因此plastic为本题答案，该词作形容词时意为“塑料的”，作名词时表示“塑料”。

结合空前的Collect，预测答案为名词。原文中Finally做初步提示，Meat and fish counters原词重现，Clean、area、including、weighing scales均原词重现。接下来原文问到Anything else，回答内容中说The fish is laid on ice，fish原词重现，相关信息提及当冰融化时，需要从冷藏室取更多，get对应空前的Collect。因此名词ice即本题答案。
结合空前wear special，预测答案为名词。原文中wear原词重现，紧跟内容为a hat，但回答者给出否定答复“won’t …”，故排除这一信息。接着原文在but之后讲到make sure you put on thermal gloves，put on可以表示“戴上，穿上”，对应空前wear，因此名词gloves即本题答案，意为“手套”。
